title: anyfps
description: Allows your FPS to be capped above 250!
body:
# About
Simple mod that aims to fix many of the problems and limitations with the Vanilla FPS limiter. This includes:
 - the ability to set the FPS at any specific value
 - the ability to have full control over the FPS slider functionality, including its min/max range and intervals of the slider's snapping points

Every feature above is configurable with the [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod.

Eventually, I plan to fix some of the Vanilla bugs with how the FPS is actually limited, primarily the bug where the FPS is always capped at roughly ~96% of the value it's set to.

# Compatibility
This should already be compatible with any mod that doesn't change the video GUI like Sodium, however, Sodium compatibility is officially implemented. Only 1.20.1+ has been tested, but the mod is simple enough that it will likely work on versions far older.
